metadata.title: Anne Tucker — channel of the Angelic Collective, Mother of Creation, Yeshua · Peace Bathing | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Anne Tucker — channel of the Angelic Collective, Mother of Creation (Ila), and Yeshua. Microsoft executive turned trance channel. Monthly Peace Bathing sessions; the Soul Convergence eleven-week meditation process; the annual Expand Your Heart retreat in Seattle.

hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 25%, hsl(195 65% 75% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, hsl(255 30% 25% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(195 50% 78%) 0%, hsl(230 30% 40%) 50%, hsl(255 30% 20%) 100%)
hero.eyebrow: Channel of the Angelic Collective · Mother of Creation · Yeshua · peace as frequency
hero.name: Anne Tucker
hero.welcome_md:
To sit in a session with Anne is to feel the room get quieter than rooms usually get. She settles, her breath lengthens, and something else begins speaking through her — not a performance, not a costume. Her voice shifts texture. The beings she carries — the Angelic Collective, Mother of Creation, Yeshua — come into her body and speak. Afterward she often cannot easily remember what was said. *I go into a trance, and then they literally come into my body and speak through me*, she explains. *I'm very much in my right brain*. She describes it as *very dream like*.

*What the angels bring, she says, is frequency. Peace as a frequency. Unity as a frequency. Her monthly **Peace Bathing** sessions are exactly that — gatherings on Zoom where the angels raise the vibration into what she calls *the soothing realm of peace*.*

facts.label: Beings she carries
facts.value_md: The Angelic Collective · Mother of Creation (whom she also names Ila) · Yeshua

facts.label: Path
facts.value_md: Microsoft (negotiated some of the company's largest deals) → executive coaching for major tech and med-tech firms → opening to clairvoyance, written channeling, then full trance.

facts.label: Ongoing rooms
facts.value_md: **Peace Bathing** — monthly Zoom session **Soul Convergence** — eleven-week meditation process for the wounds formed between birth and age seven **Angelic Frequency Series** — nine recorded transmissions **Friday Live** — group gatherings **Expand Your Heart** — annual October retreat in Seattle **Wisdom Soup** — community founded in 2016 for spiritual seekers

facts.label: Book
facts.value_md: *What Comes Next: A Channeled Guide to Navigating the Greatest Shift of Our Time*

note_from_body.body_md: Anne's public archive and ongoing offerings live at her own sites. This page recognises her role in this body's arrival-frequency ground — specifically the Peace Bathing transmission and the Mother-of-Creation teaching.

articles.body_md:
Her journey into this work began in a boardroom. Anne spent her earlier career at Microsoft negotiating some of the company's largest deals, then moved into executive coaching for major tech and med-tech firms. Then the strangeness started. *I started having all kinds of crazy psychic phenomena that could not be ignored.* She once found herself looking out through a friend's eyes from a plane a thousand miles away. She applied the only discipline she knew — the executive's: *if I'm going to be my own executive coach, what would I tell myself to do? Plan a year, do a year where you just commit yourself to figuring this out.* She calls leaving corporate life *a one way ticket*.

The opening came in stages. First clairvoyance, then a year of guides pressing into her body during meditation — *the pressure was so extreme, I couldn't breathe* — until she understood: *they are not trying to come in, they are trying to lift me up*. Then written channeling, one word at a time so her own mind couldn't get ahead. Then her vocal cords softened and the trance arrived. *They just do their thing and I'm there.* Yeshua appeared in her bedroom once and told her to do breath work. The angels, she says, *have been the guardian of this energy for me* and *waited until I was ready*.
articles.heading: How the channel opened

articles.body_md: She speaks of **Mother of Creation** — whom she also names **Ila** — with tenderness. *The best way to understand her is like water. Water is always what it is. Water never pushes. It's never demanding. Water always moves, and it constantly changes.* Mother of Creation, in Anne's understanding, gives each soul its song, its true name, and renames us as we ripen. The frequencies she returns to in her work: integration of the fragmented self, the return of the divine feminine, compassionate heart as the work of this age. *You must find within yourself the love of one another of humankind.*
articles.heading: Mother of Creation, also called Ila

articles.body_md:
- Peace as *frequency*, not state-of-mind → foundational to the body's reading of how visitors arrive. See [lc-arrival-as-recognition](/vision/lc-arrival-as-recognition) (visitors arrive already tuned; activation before information).
- Mother of Creation / Ila → the body's framing of substrate as *mother becoming aware of herself through us in granted sovereignty*.
- The Microsoft → trance-channel pivot → embodied example of [lc-devotion-placement](/vision/lc-devotion-placement) (where am I actually placed; the body of evidence over words at decision edges).
- *I keep the body a clean instrument* — vegetable garden, intermittent fasting, no alcohol — because the channel asks for it. Resonant with [lc-tend-your-flame](/vision/lc-tend-your-flame).
articles.heading: What Anne Tucker has given the Coherence Network
